profile.name: Parham Barazesh
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.about: I build reliable, user-focused software with a strong bias for clean architecture and measurable impact. I enjoy turning complex problems into clear product experiences and scalable systems.
highlights: 4+ years building web and cloud products
Strong focus on React, TypeScript, and modern frontend architecture
Experienced in API design, CI/CD, and quality engineering

coreArchitecturalFocus.title: Cloud-Native Systems
items: Designing resilient microservices and distributed systems
Containerized workloads with Docker and Kubernetes

coreArchitecturalFocus.title: Data Engineering
items: High-throughput ETL and Reverse ETL pipelines
Reliable data platform architecture for analytics

coreArchitecturalFocus.title: Machine Learning Systems
items: Model-enabled product features for real business impact
Bridging algorithmic complexity with maintainable software
Scientific computing with Python and MATLAB

education.summary: Focused on software engineering fundamentals, algorithms, and distributed systems.
details: Graduated with a strong focus on practical software engineering.
Led a capstone project on real-time data processing.

experience.summary: Built performant product interfaces and improved core user journeys.
details: Redesigned key dashboard flows and reduced interaction steps by 30%.
Introduced component architecture and design tokens to improve UI consistency.
Implemented test coverage improvements and CI checks for release stability.

experience.summary: Developed full-stack features and integrations for enterprise clients.
details: Delivered multiple API integrations with external providers.
